mapper.select:
/* 토론 참여 대상 리스트 ForumEzGraderDAO.listForumJoinUser */ SELECT A.STD_ID AS stdNo , A.USER_ID AS userId , IFNULL(A.SCR, 0) AS SCR , A.EVLYN AS evalYn , A.DEPTNM AS deptNm , A.USERNM AS userNm , A.USER_ID AS userId , IF(A.ATCL_CNT > 0, 'JOIN', 'NOTJOIN') AS joinStatus FROM ( SELECT A.STD_ID , A.USER_ID , B.SCR , B.EVLYN , D.DEPTNM , D.USERNM , E.USER_ID , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL AA WHERE AA.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND AA.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' ) ATCL_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL AA LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS BB ON AA.DSCS_ID = BB.DSCS_ID WHERE AA.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND AA.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.FRST_INQ_DTTM >= BB.DSCS_EDTTM ) AFTER_ATCL_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT AA WHERE AA.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND AA.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' ) CMNT_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT AA LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS BB ON AA.DSCS_ID = BB.DSCS_ID WHERE AA.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND AA.STD_ID = #{userId} AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.FRST_INQ_DTTM >= BB.DSCS_EDTTM ) AFTER_CMNT_CNT FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP B ON A.STD_ID = B.STD_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} JOIN TB_LMS_USR D ON A.USER_ID = D.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT E ON D.USER_ID = E.USER_ID AND E.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N'
AND A.STD_ID IN ( SELECT D.STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE D LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC E ON D.EXAM_ID = E.EXAM_ID AND D.REEXAMYN = 'Y' WHERE 1 = 1 AND E.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = B.DSCS_ID )
) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.ATCL_CNT > 0
AND A.ATCL_CNT = 0
AND A.AFTER_ATCL_CNT > 0
ORDER BY A.USER_ID
ORDER BY A.USERNM
ORDER BY IF(A.ATCL_CNT > 0, 1, 2), A.USER_ID

/* 토론 참여 대상 team ForumEzGraderDAO.listForumJoinTeam */ SELECT A.TEAM_TYCD , A.TEAM_CTGRNM , A.TEAM_ID , A.TEAMNM , A.STD_ID , A.TEAM_LDRYN , A.SCR , A.EVLYN , A.USER_ID , A.DEPTNM , A.USERNM , A.USER_ID , IF(A.ATCL_CNT + A.CMNT_CNT > 0, 'JOIN', 'NOTJOIN') AS JOIN_STATUS FROM ( SELECT A.TEAM_TYCD , A.TEAM_CTGRNM , B.TEAM_ID , B.TEAMNM , H.DSCS_ID , C.STD_ID , C.TEAM_LDRYN , G.SCR , G.EVLYN , D.USER_ID , E.DEPTNM , E.USERNM , F.USER_ID , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL AA WHERE AA.DSCS_ID = H.DSCS_ID AND AA.STD_ID = C.STD_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' ) ATCL_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT AA WHERE AA.DSCS_ID = H.DSCS_ID AND AA.STD_ID = C.STD_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' ) CMNT_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL AA WHERE 1 = 1 AND AA.FRST_INQ_DTTM BETWEEN H.EXTD_SDTTM AND H.EXTD_EDTTM AND AA.DSCS_ID = H.DSCS_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' ) AS AFTER_ATCL_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT AA WHERE 1 = 1 AND AA.FRST_INQ_DTTM BETWEEN H.EXTD_SDTTM AND H.EXTD_EDTTM AND AA.DSCS_ID = H.DSCS_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' ) AS AFTER_CMNT_CNT FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_CTGR A JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM B ON A.TEAM_TYCD = B.TEAM_TYCD JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS H ON A.TEAM_TYCD = H.TEAM_TYCD JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR C ON B.TEAM_ID = C.TEAM_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT D ON C.STD_ID = D.STD_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USR E ON D.USER_ID = E.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT F ON E.USER_ID = F.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP G ON C.STD_ID = G.STD_ID AND G.DELYN = 'N' AND G.DSCS_ID = H.DSCS_ID WHERE H.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} ) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.ATCL_CNT + A.CMNT_CNT > 0
AND A.ATCL_CNT + A.CMNT_CNT = 0
AND (A.AFTER_ATCL_CNT > 0 OR A.AFTER_CMNT_CNT > 0)
ORDER BY LENGTH(A.TEAMNM), A.TEAMNM, A.USER_ID
ORDER BY LENGTH(A.TEAMNM), A.TEAMNM, A.USERNM
ORDER BY LENGTH(A.TEAMNM), A.TEAMNM, IF(A.ATCL_CNT + A.CMNT_CNT > 0, 1, 2), A.USERNM

/* ezGrader 평가 결과 조회 ForumEzGraderDAO.selectEzgEvalRslt */ SELECT B.MTL_EVL_CD AS mutEvalCd , B.EVL_DTTM AS evalDttm , B.QSTN_NOS AS qstnNos , B.EVL_SCRS AS evalScores , B.EVL_TOT_SCR AS evalTotal , A.SCR AS evalScore , B.EVL_CTS AS evalCts , A.EVLYN AS evalYn , B.EVL_STSCD AS evalStatusCd FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP A LEFT JOIN MTL_EVL_RSLT B ON A.STD_ID = B.EVLTEE_ID AND B.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID = #{evalCd} AND B.EVLTR_ID = #{evalUserId} WHERE A.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND A.STD_ID = #{evalTrgtUserId}

/* ezGrader 문항별 배점 총합 조회 ForumEzGraderDAO.selectSumAllotScore */ SELECT SUM(IFNULL(( SELECT MAX(MTL_EVL_MRK_GRDCD) FROM MTL_EVL_GRD AA WHERE AA.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID = A.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID AND AA.QSTN_ID = B.QSTN_ID ), 100)) AS allotScore FROM MTL_EVL A JOIN MTL_EVL_QSTN B ON A.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID = B.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID AND A.MTL_EVL_TYCD = B.MTL_EVL_TYCD WHERE A.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID = #{evalCd}

/* ezGrader 평가 정보 조회 ForumEzGraderDAO.selectEzgEvalInfo */ SELECT A.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID AS evalCd , B.MTL_EVL_TTL AS evalTitle , B.MTL_EVL_TYCD AS evalTypeCd FROM TB_LMS_MUT_EVAL_RLTN A JOIN MTL_EVL B ON A.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID = B.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.LINK_CD = #{forumCd} AND A.EVAL_DIV_CD = 'PROFESSOR_EVAL'

/* ezGrader 평가 문항 목록(등급 포함) 조회 ForumEzGraderDAO.listEzgEvalQstn */ SELECT A.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID , B.MTL_EVL_TYCD , B.MTL_EVL_TTL , C.QSTN_ID , C.QSTN_SEQNO , C.QSTN_CTS , D.GRDCD , D.MTL_EVL_GRD_TTL , D.MTL_EVL_GRD_CTS , D.MTL_EVL_MRK_GRDCD , IFNULL(MAX(D.MTL_EVL_MRK_GRDCD) OVER(PARTITION BY A.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID, C.QSTN_ID), 100) AS ALLOT_SCORE FROM TB_LMS_MUT_EVAL_RLTN A JOIN MTL_EVL B ON A.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID = B.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID JOIN MTL_EVL_QSTN C ON B.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID = C.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID
LEFT JOIN MTL_EVL_GRD D ON C.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID = D.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID AND C.QSTN_ID = D.QSTN_ID WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.LINK_CD = #{forumCd} AND A.EVAL_DIV_CD = 'PROFESSOR_EVAL' ORDER BY C.QSTN_SEQNO, D.MTL_EVL_MRK_GRDCD DESC
